title: French Toast
description: Rich, custardy French toast with a hint of cinnamon and vanilla. A weekend breakfast classic.

ingredients.item: powdered sugar, maple syrup, fresh berries

steps.instruction: Whisk together eggs, milk, vanilla, cinnamon, and sugar in a shallow bowl until well combined.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat and melt 1 tablespoon of butter.
Dip each bread slice in the egg mixture, letting it soak for about 20 seconds per side.
Cook the soaked bread in the skillet for 2–3 minutes per side until golden brown and slightly crispy on the edges.
Repeat with remaining slices, adding more butter as needed.
Serve dusted with powdered sugar, a drizzle of maple syrup, and fresh berries.

notes: Thick-cut brioche makes this extra indulgent. Day-old bread works best as it absorbs the custard without getting soggy.
